profile.name: Shreyash Golhani
profile.bio: Passionate to solve real time problems through ideation and programming

prs.title: feat: add governance layer inside AgentExecutor ReAct loop
prs.body:
- Insert policy check between tool resolution and tool.call()
- Add policyLoader, policyChecker, hitl, auditLogger modules
- policies.yaml with allow/deny/escalate rules
- Append-only audit log at project root
- Human-in-the-loop via CLI readline

prs.title: feat(diagrams): add architecture, request pipeline and use case diagrams
prs.body: Adds 3 system diagrams — module dependency graph showing event-driven communication between all 4 domains, request pipeline flowchart showing the full middleware chain, and use case diagram mapping actor interactions across all modules.

prs.title: Purescript
prs.body:
### **PR Type** Enhancement ___ ### **Description** - Add hello world examples for five programming languages - Elm functional language with HTML rendering example - Nix package manager configuration example - PureScript functional language with console output - Raku dynamic language with simple output - ReasonML functional language with JavaScript interop ___ ### Diagram Walkthrough ```mermaid flowchart LR A["contributions/"] --> B["Elm/hello_world.elm"] A --> C["Nix/hello_world.nix"] A --> D["Purescript/hello_world.purs"] A --> E["Raku/hello_world.raku"] A --> F["ReasonML/hello_world.re"] ```

File Walkthrough
Relevant files
Enhancement
hello_world.elm
Elm hello world example                                                                   
contributions/Elm/hello_world.elm
  • Add Elm hello world example
  • Uses Html module to render text output
  • Demonstrates basic Elm module structure
 +1/-0     
hello_world.nix
Nix hello world example                                                                   
contributions/Nix/hello_world.nix
  • Add Nix hello world example
  • Simple attribute set configuration
  • Demonstrates basic Nix syntax
 +1/-0     
hello_world..purs
PureScript hello world example                                                     
contributions/Purescript/hello_world..purs
  • Add PureScript hello world example
  • Uses Effect monad for console logging
  • Demonstrates module and import structure
 +1/-0     
hello_world.raku
Raku hello world example                                                                 
contributions/Raku/hello_world.raku
  • Add Raku hello world example
  • Uses say function for output
  • Demonstrates simple Raku syntax
 +1/-0     
hello_world.re
ReasonML hello world example                                                         
contributions/ReasonML/hello_world.re
  • Add ReasonML hello world example
  • Uses Js.log for JavaScript interop
  • Demonstrates ReasonML syntax
 +1/-0     
___

prs.title: Reason ml
prs.body:
### **PR Type** Enhancement ___ ### **Description** - Add hello world examples for four languages - Elm, Nix, Raku, and ReasonML implementations - Expand language contribution collection ___ ### Diagram Walkthrough ```mermaid flowchart LR contributions["contributions directory"] elm["Elm/hello_world.elm"] nix["Nix/hello_world.nix"] raku["Raku/hello_world.raku"] reasonml["ReasonML/hello_world.re"] contributions -- "add" --> elm contributions -- "add" --> nix contributions -- "add" --> raku contributions -- "add" --> reasonml ```

File Walkthrough
Relevant files
Enhancement
hello_world.elm
Elm hello world example                                                                   
contributions/Elm/hello_world.elm
  • Add Elm hello world program
  • Uses Html module to display text
  • Exposes main function
 +1/-0     
hello_world.nix
Nix hello world configuration                                                       
contributions/Nix/hello_world.nix
  • Add Nix hello world configuration
  • Simple attribute set with hello string
 +1/-0     
hello_world.raku
Raku hello world example                                                                 
contributions/Raku/hello_world.raku - Add Raku hello world program - Uses say function for output
+1/-0     
hello_world.re
ReasonML hello world example                                                         
contributions/ReasonML/hello_world.re - Add ReasonML hello world program - Uses Js.log for console output
+1/-0     
___ ## Summary by CodeRabbit * **New Features** * Added Hello World example programs for four programming languages: Elm, Nix, Raku, and ReasonML. These samples expand the contributions collection with reference implementations across different language paradigms. Developers can now access concise examples in each language to quickly understand basic syntax and program structure.

prs.title: feat:add-your-feature-description
prs.body: I add the email-validation , what verify user email and send the email to our email id for validation , for if now I add my passkey , please change your passkey through creating a new key on web3forms ...

issues.title: Feature added : Add email validation
issues.body: Hey I am Shreyash Golhani GSSOC'25 contributor, as I reviewing your amazing website , I found email was send automatically without reviewing it , it is missing for better user experience , could you please , assigned this issue to me ..
